layout.title: Compliance Page
layout.description: Configure your public compliance page to showcase your security and compliance posture.

accessPage.title: External Access
accessPage.description: Manage who can access your compliance page

auditsPage.title: Audits
auditsPage.description: Manage audit reports and compliance certifications

errors.update: Failed to update compliance page branding

fileTooLarge.title: File size too large
fileTooLarge.description: The file size is too large. Please upload a file smaller than 5MB.

logo.label: Logo
logo.description: This logo will be displayed on your public compliance page.
logo.uploadDescription: Upload logo image (PNG, JPG, SVG, WEBP up to 5MB)

darkLogo.label: Dark mode logo
darkLogo.description: This logo will be used when dark mode is enabled.
darkLogo.uploadDescription: Upload dark logo image (PNG, JPG, SVG, WEBP up to 5MB)

visualIdentity.title: Visual identity
visualIdentity.description: Square logos displayed on your public compliance page.

domains.title: Domains
domains.description: Your compliance page is always available on its default probopage.com subdomain. You can also serve it on one custom domain of your own.

profile.title: General information
profile.description: Description and contact details shown to visitors.

fields.eyebrowPlaceholder: Small accent label above the title
fields.title: Title
Title
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what this group of commitments covers

commitmentGroupList.title: Security Commitments
commitmentGroupList.description: Group commitment cards into sections shown on your compliance page

delete.title: Delete Group
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete the group "{{title}}"?
delete.warning: All commitment cards in this group will also be deleted. This action cannot be undone.

documentsPage.title: Documents
documentsPage.description: Manage policies, procedures and compliance documents

empty.description: Add your own domain to make your compliance page more professional

thirdPartiesPage.title: Subprocessors
thirdPartiesPage.description: Manage subprocessor assessments and third-party risk information

referenceList.dragHint: Drag and drop references to change their displayed order

referencesPage.title: References
referencesPage.description: Showcase your customers and partners on your compliance page

activation.title: Activate compliance page
activation.description: Make your compliance page publicly accessible to build customer confidence

indexing.title: Search engine indexing
indexing.description: Allow search engines to index your compliance page and make it discoverable
indexing.disabledHint: Activate your compliance page first to enable search engine indexing

slackSection.title: Integrations

disconnect.title: Disconnect Slack
disconnect.description: Are you sure you want to disconnect this Slack channel? This action cannot be undone.

slackSection.emptyDescription: Manage your compliance page access with Slack

slackConnectionCard.title: Slack
slackConnectionCard.notConfiguredDescription: Slack is connected, but no channel is set up for the compliance page yet.

ndaSection.title: Non-disclosure agreement
ndaSection.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the NDA file?
ndaSection.uploadDescription: Upload a Non-Disclosure Agreement that visitors must accept before accessing your compliance page
ndaSection.acceptanceDescription: Visitors will need to accept this NDA before accessing your compliance page

frameworkList.dragHint: Drag and drop public frameworks to change their displayed order

externalUrls.title: Custom links
externalUrls.description: Add external URLs to display on your compliance page
externalUrls.dragHint: Drag and drop to change the displayed order

sendUpdateDialog.title: Send update to subscribers
sendUpdateDialog.description: This update will be sent to all current subscribers of this mailing list. This action cannot be undone.

errors.enqueue: Failed to enqueue update for delivery

newSubscriberDialog.title: Add subscriber
newSubscriberDialog.description: Add a person to receive security and compliance updates

validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address

newSubscriberDialog.consentNotice: By checking this box, you certify that you have obtained verifiable prior consent from this individual to receive these communications, in compliance with applicable data protection regulations (for example, GDPR and CAN-SPAM). You accept full responsibility for demonstrating proof of consent if required.

updateFormDialog.confidentialityNotice: Do not include confidential or sensitive information in this update. Any content that requires protection should be placed behind your NDA-gated documents instead.
updateFormDialog.sentNotice: This update has been sent and can no longer be edited.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure how your mailing list behaves

deleteFileDialog.title: Delete file
deleteFileDialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete this file? This action cannot be undone.

filesPage.title: Files
filesPage.description: Upload and manage files for your compliance page

newDomainDialog.title: Add domain
newDomainDialog.description: Enter your domain and we'll generate the DNS records you need to add.

messages.created: Domain added successfully. Configure the DNS records to verify and activate your domain.

deleteDomainDialog.title: Delete custom domain
deleteDomainDialog.description: This will permanently delete the custom domain {{domain}} and all its configuration.

active.title: Domain is active
active.description: Your custom domain is verified and SSL certificate is active

dns.title: DNS configuration
dns.description: Add these DNS records to your domain to complete verification
dns.name: Name

domainDialog.pendingDescription: After adding the DNS records, verification will happen automatically. This may take a few minutes to propagate.

frameworkList.title: Compliance frameworks
frameworkList.description: Select which frameworks to show on your public compliance page.
